text: "Hello?" "Hello?" "Good afternoon. This is Jacob. So, I'm calling because they're pending grocery and cash benefits worth up to $300 available on your Medicare account through West Virginia state relief program. So, have you received any notification about these benefits yet?" "Nice." "Oh, that's alright. That's exactly why I'm calling. And I want to help you get these benefits processed before they go unclaimed. You're covered under both part A and part B, yes?" "No." "Sorry, but you don't seem to qualify for the plans that we have. Have a great day." "Don't call back."
